hero.title: Where Mediterranean Flavors
hero.subtitle: Discover an exceptional culinary experience in the heart of Algiers, where tradition meets modernity in every dish.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: A passion for Mediterranean cuisine
story.paragraph1: Le Jardin was born from a simple yet profound love for Mediterranean cuisine. Founded by Chef Antoine Moreau, a third-generation culinary artist from Marseille with Algerian roots, our restaurant is the culmination of a lifelong journey through the flavors of the Mediterranean basin.
story.paragraph2: After training in some of the most prestigious kitchens in Paris, Barcelona, and Istanbul, Chef Antoine returned to his ancestral homeland to create a dining experience that pays homage to the rich culinary traditions of the region while embracing modern techniques and presentation.
story.paragraph3: Every dish at Le Jardin tells a story — a story of sun-drenched coastlines, bustling souks, family gatherings, and the simple joy of sharing a beautiful meal with loved ones. Our menu changes with the seasons, ensuring that every visit offers something new and exciting.

chef.title: The Chef
chef.subtitle: A culinary artist
chef.name: Chef Antoine Moreau
chef.description: With over 20 years of experience in Michelin-starred restaurants across Europe and the Mediterranean, Chef Antoine brings a wealth of knowledge and creativity to every plate. His philosophy is simple: let the ingredients speak for themselves. By sourcing the finest local and imported produce, he creates dishes that are both rooted in tradition and refreshingly innovative.
chef.dish3: Fondant au Chocolat à la Fleur de Sel

items.starters_1_desc: Grilled sourdough topped with vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh basil, and drizzled with extra virgin olive oil
items.starters_2_desc: Lightly battered calamari served with a zesty lemon aioli and micro herbs
items.starters_3_desc: Fresh tuna, hard-boiled eggs, olives, and green beans on a bed of mixed greens with anchovy vinaigrette
items.main_1_desc: Slow-cooked lamb with apricots, almonds, and aromatic spices, served with fluffy couscous
items.main_2_desc: Traditional Provençal seafood stew with prawns, mussels, fish, and saffron, served with rouille and croutons
items.main_3_name: Filet de Bar à la Plancha
items.main_3_desc: Pan-seared sea bass with ratatouille, basil oil, and a light tomato beurre blanc
items.desserts_1_name: Fondant au Chocolat à la Fleur de Sel
items.desserts_1_desc: Rich chocolate fondant with a molten center, sprinkled with fleur de sel and served with vanilla ice cream
items.desserts_2_desc: Classic crème brûlée infused with Provençal lavender, topped with caramelized sugar
items.drinks_1_desc: Traditional Moroccan mint tea served with delicate pastries
items.drinks_2_desc: House-made lemonade with fresh mint and a hint of orange blossom water

reservation.title: Book Your Table
reservation.subtitle: Experience an unforgettable culinary journey
reservation.description: Whether for a romantic dinner, a business lunch or a family celebration, our team will be delighted to welcome you and offer you an exceptional moment.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Their experience speaks for itself
testimonials.test1_text: An exceptional culinary experience! The setting is beautiful, the service impeccable, and every dish is a work of art. The Lamb Tagine is simply divine.
testimonials.test2_text: Le Jardin is without doubt the best Mediterranean restaurant in Algiers. The Royal Bouillabaisse transported me straight to the Marseille coast.
testimonials.test3_text: The atmosphere is warm and elegant. The staff is attentive and knows the menu perfectly. A true culinary gem.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here for you
contact.address: 12 Rue des Jardins, Algiers Center, 16000 Algiers, Algeria

footer.tagline: Fine Mediterranean Dining in the Heart of Algiers
